subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the All-Merciful! In every region from among the sacred dawning-places are certain women, drawn forth from the sepulchre of the world of nature [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمان در هر کوری از مطالع مقدسه چند نساء منجذبه از مرقد عالم طبیعت
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @spiritual transformation, @excellence; distinction, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
